highlights: Licensed experts for residential and industrial sites

services.title: Residential Wiring
services.description: Full rewires, panel upgrades, outlets, lighting, and fault resolution for homes and apartment buildings.

services.title: Commercial Fit-Outs
services.description: Electrical planning and delivery for offices, retail units, hospitality spaces, and mixed-use properties.

services.title: Breakdown Response
services.description: Rapid diagnostics and emergency repair services to restore power safely and reduce downtime.

services.title: Security Systems
services.description: CCTV, access control, alarms, and integrated low-voltage systems for safer operations.

services.title: Maintenance
services.description: Preventive inspections, scheduled servicing, and energy-efficiency improvements for ongoing reliability.

services.title: Installations
services.description: Switchboards, lighting plans, EV chargers, backup power, and custom electrical infrastructure.

offers.title: Safety Maintenance
offers.description: Routine inspections and corrective maintenance to reduce risk before faults turn into outages.

offers.title: Electrical Installation
offers.description: New power and lighting systems designed around your layout, budget, and future growth.

offers.title: Service Maintenance
offers.description: Fast-response support packages with clear SLAs for business continuity and peace of mind.

projects.title: Industrial Retrofit
projects.description: Control panel modernization for a logistics facility with zero unplanned downtime.

projects.title: Office Expansion
projects.description: Structured cabling, lighting, and access control for a growing Amsterdam headquarters.

projects.title: Apartment Upgrade
projects.description: Panel replacement and energy-efficient lighting rollout across a residential block.

testimonials.name: Mina Verhoeven
testimonials.quote: The team coordinated around our operating hours and delivered a clean, well-documented install.

testimonials.name: Ruben de Wit
testimonials.quote: Communication stayed clear from quote to handover, and the emergency support is excellent.

testimonials.name: Sophie Kramer
testimonials.quote: They solved a persistent wiring issue that two previous contractors missed. Professional and reassuring.

contact.intro: Tell us what you need help with and we will respond with next steps, availability, and an estimated timeline.
